_about: SPEC-004 / DR-009 — hand-assigned expected tiers for SWE-bench-Verified instances. Patches live in gitignored .data/; only these labels are committed. Fill `labels` after running fetch-swebench.mjs.

_rubric.T1: One concept, one/two files, < ~20 lines. Typo, off-by-one, guard.
_rubric.T2: Small feature or multi-file fix, < ~100 lines, one subsystem.
_rubric.T4: Architectural / wide blast radius, 500+ lines or 16+ files.
_rubric._note: Label the task as a HUMAN would scope it, independent of raw diff size. Disagreements between human scope and the size-based classifier are the interesting data.
